channel.title: Arpit Yadav | Technical Blog & Projects
channel.description: Engineering insights, robotics achievements, and updates on Embedded Systems, IoT, and hardware design by Arpit Yadav.

item.title: Developing a PID Controller for a Line-following Robot
item.description: An in-depth breakdown of designing a custom PID feedback loop for precise differential-drive control.

item.title: Building a Smart Agricultural Node with ESP32 & MQTT
item.description: Implementing low-power sleep modes, calibrating capacitive moisture sensors, and streaming telemetry over MQTT.
